# kSecAttrKeySizeInBits

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the number of bits in a cryptographic key.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrKeySizeInBits: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] and indicates the total number of bits in this cryptographic key.
title: kSecAttrKeySizeInBits
